title: crataegus pinnatifida f. geholensis
intro: Crataegus pinnatifida f. geholensis, a variant of the Chinese hawthorn plant, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and polyphenols, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pinnatifida f. geholensis include cardiovascular support, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular choice in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, dyslipidemia, and other cardiovascular diseases.
